topic: Learning curves in real-world AI adoption
goal: Examine how users move from shallow prompting to durable, high-value workflows and which product or training choices accelerate that progression.
seed_questions: Which user behaviors best predict movement from novice AI use toward repeatable, compounding workflow gains?
Do guided scaffolds and examples shorten the time required to reach durable AI-assisted productivity?

seed_definitions.name: AI learning curve
seed_definitions.meaning: The path by which users accumulate the skill, habits, and workflow understanding needed to extract increasing value from AI systems over time.

seed_definitions.name: workflow maturity
seed_definitions.meaning: The degree to which AI use is integrated into a repeatable process rather than isolated one-off prompts.
